column1: # Open WebUI exporter — model price sheet (TEMPLATE)
# Rows here OVERRIDE the built-in table in pricing.py; models you don't list keep
# their built-in price. All prices are US dollars per 1
#   model             model id exactly as Open WebUI reports it (e.g. gpt-4o
#   cache_read_per_1m $ per 1M cached-prompt tokens on a cache hit. 0 if n/a.
#   cache_write_per_1m $ per 1M tokens to write the prompt cache. 0 if n/a.
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored. Keep the header row below.
# Local models: real API cost is $0 — set an internal chargeback rate or 0.
